description_en: Silken tofu simmered in a fiery sauce of chili bean paste, Sichuan peppercorns, and ground pork.
description_zh: 嫩豆腐在辣椒豆瓣酱、花椒和猪肉末中慢炖而成，麻辣鲜香。

description_en: Diced chicken stir-fried with dried chilies, peanuts, and Sichuan peppercorns in a glossy sweet-spicy sauce.
description_zh: 鸡丁与干辣椒、花生和花椒爆炒，裹上光亮的甜辣酱汁。

description_en: Thin wheat noodles topped with spicy chili oil, sesame paste, minced pork, and scallions.
description_zh: 细面条淋上辣椒油、芝麻酱、肉末和葱花，麻辣爽口。

description_en: Pork belly first boiled then stir-fried with leeks, green peppers, and doubanjiang for a smoky, savory finish.
description_zh: 猪五花先煮后炒，与蒜苗、青椒和豆瓣酱同炒，香气浓郁。

description_en: Soft eggplant braised in a tangy-spicy sauce of vinegar, chili, garlic, and ginger — no fish required.
description_zh: 茄子软烂，裹上以醋、辣椒、大蒜和姜调制的鱼香汁，酸辣开胃。

description_en: Thin-sliced fish fillets poached in a bold, numbing chili broth with bean sprouts and tofu.
description_zh: 鱼片在麻辣汤中汆煮，配豆芽和豆腐，汤色红亮，麻辣鲜美。

description_en: Tender beef slices cooked in a scorching numbing-spicy broth poured over vegetables at the table.
description_zh: 嫩滑的牛肉片在麻辣汤中浸煮，上桌时浇上热油，香气四溢。

description_en: Chilled sliced beef and tripe tossed in a bold red chili oil with sesame and peanuts — a Sichuan cold starter.
description_zh: 熟牛肉和牛杂切薄片，淋上辣椒油、芝麻和花生，是经典的四川凉菜。

description_en: Poached whole chicken sliced and drenched in a vibrant chili oil, sesame, and Sichuan pepper sauce.
description_zh: 白斩鸡淋上红亮的辣椒油、芝麻和花椒汁，麻辣鲜香，令人垂涎。

description_en: Pork-filled wontons served in a pool of fragrant red chili oil with soy and Sichuan pepper.
description_zh: 猪肉馄饨淋上浓郁的红油、酱油和花椒，是成都街头最受欢迎的小吃。

description_en: A sizzling dry wok of your chosen proteins and vegetables tossed in mala spice paste — customizable and intensely flavorful.
description_zh: 食材在麻辣酱中干炒，可自选荤素，香辣刺激，干香十足。

description_en: Chewy noodles served cold with sesame paste, chili oil, cucumber strips, and bean sprouts.
description_zh: 劲道面条拌上芝麻酱、辣椒油、黄瓜丝和豆芽，清爽又过瘾。

description_en: Chilled soft tofu topped with century egg, soy sauce, sesame oil, and scallions — a refreshing appetizer.
description_zh: 冷豆腐上摆皮蛋，淋酱油和香油，撒葱花，清爽开胃。

description_en: Thin-sliced chilled pork belly drizzled with garlic, chili oil, and soy sauce — a classic Sichuan cold dish.
description_zh: 白切猪五花切薄片，浇上蒜泥、辣椒油和酱油，是四川凉菜的经典。

description_en: Paper-thin slices of prime beef swished through bubbling hotpot broth until just cooked — melt-in-your-mouth tender.
description_zh: 极薄的优质牛肉片在滚烫的火锅汤底中涮熟，入口即化。

description_en: Thinly sliced lamb cooked briefly in hotpot broth, dipped in sesame sauce for a satisfying northern Chinese combination.
description_zh: 薄切羊肉片在火锅中涮熟，蘸上芝麻酱，是北方涮锅的经典吃法。

description_en: Beef honeycomb tripe that snaps with every bite after a quick dip in spicy hotpot broth — an essential order.
description_zh: 毛肚在辣汤中烫七八秒即可，口感脆嫩有弹性，是火锅必点食材。

description_en: Silky cubes of duck blood soaked in spicy broth — a hotpot staple loved for its smooth texture.
description_zh: 嫩滑的鸭血块在麻辣汤底中慢慢浸熟，口感细腻，吸满汤汁。

description_en: Delicate golden thread mushrooms that soak up hotpot broth beautifully — a must-order vegetarian addition.
description_zh: 细长的金针菇在火锅汤底中煮熟，吸满汤汁，嫩滑爽口。

description_en: Marbled fatty beef rolls that release rich juices into the broth as they cook — pure hotpot indulgence.
description_zh: 油花丰富的肥牛卷在火锅中涮熟，油脂渗入汤底，鲜美无比。

description_en: Rolled sheets of dried tofu skin that absorb broth and develop a delightfully chewy texture in the hotpot.
description_zh: 豆腐皮卷在火锅中煮至柔韧，充分吸收汤汁，越嚼越香。

description_en: Smooth balls of fresh shrimp paste that cook into tender, bouncy morsels in the hotpot.
description_zh: 新鲜虾肉打成泥，在火锅中煮熟后弹牙爽口，鲜甜无比。

description_en: Melt-in-your-mouth pork belly slow-braised in soy sauce, Shaoxing wine, and rock sugar until lacquered and irresistible.
description_zh: 猪五花用酱油、绍兴酒和冰糖慢炖，色泽红亮，软烂入味，入口即化。

description_en: Rich, slow-simmered beef broth with tender braised chunks of beef and springy wheat noodles.
description_zh: 用牛骨慢熬的浓郁汤底，搭配软烂的红烧牛肉和劲道面条，暖胃暖心。

description_en: Silky pork-and-shrimp wontons served in a clear, fragrant broth with thin egg noodles.
description_zh: 猪肉虾仁馄饨在清澈鲜美的汤底中煮熟，配细滑蛋面，简单却令人满足。

description_en: Chilled noodles tossed in a creamy sesame-peanut dressing with julienned cucumber and a drizzle of chili oil.
description_zh: 凉面拌上浓郁的芝麻花生酱、黄瓜丝和辣椒油，清凉爽口，夏日必备。

description_en: Plain wheat noodles tossed in deeply fragrant scallion-infused oil and soy sauce — deceptively simple and addictive.
description_zh: 面条拌上以慢火炸制的葱油和酱油，香气扑鼻，越吃越香。

description_en: Beijing-style noodles topped with a savory ground pork and fermented soybean paste sauce, garnished with fresh vegetables.
description_zh: 北京风味面条，浇上由猪肉末和黄豆酱炒制的炸酱，配时令蔬菜丝。

description_en: Yunnan rice noodles served in a piping hot broth with an assortment of raw ingredients cooked tableside.
description_zh: 云南特色米线，搭配一盅滚热的高汤，将各种配料下入汤中烫熟，鲜美清甜。

description_en: Comforting noodle soup in a tangy tomato broth with fluffy scrambled eggs — the ultimate Chinese comfort food.
description_zh: 酸甜的番茄汤底配嫩滑的炒鸡蛋和软面条，是最家常最暖心的一碗面。

description_en: Hand-pulled noodles in a clear, rich beef broth topped with sliced beef, radish, and a swirl of chili oil.
description_zh: 手工拉制的面条在清澈的牛骨汤中煮熟，配牛肉片、白萝卜和辣椒油，是西北面食的代表。

description_en: Wuhan-style sesame paste noodles served hot and dry, tossed with pickled radish, scallions, and chili.
description_zh: 武汉特色热干面拌上芝麻酱、酸萝卜丁和葱花，香浓干爽，是武汉人的早餐首选。

description_en: Bold noodle soup with tender braised beef in a deeply spiced mala broth, topped with chili oil and scallions.
description_zh: 麻辣汤底中煮入红烧牛肉和面条，淋辣椒油，撒葱花，麻辣鲜香，过瘾十足。

description_en: Classic hand-folded dumplings filled with juicy pork and napa cabbage, boiled and served with black vinegar.
description_zh: 手工包制的饺子，内馅为猪肉和白菜，水煮后蘸镇江香醋，是饺子中的经典。

description_en: Translucent steamed rice-flour wrappers encasing whole, crunchy shrimp — the crown jewel of Cantonese dim sum.
description_zh: 半透明的澄面皮包裹整只弹牙的虾肉，是粤式点心中的精品，皮薄馅鲜。

description_en: Delicate steamed soup dumplings filled with a juicy pork and gelatin filling — pierce the skin carefully before eating.
description_zh: 精巧的小笼包内藏鲜美汤汁和猪肉馅，轻咬一口，汤汁四溢，是上海小吃的骄傲。

description_en: Dumplings pan-fried until the bottom is golden and crispy while the top stays soft, filled with pork and ginger.
description_zh: 饺子底部煎至金黄酥脆，顶部柔软，猪肉姜末馅鲜嫩多汁，一口一个停不下来。

description_en: Fragrant dumplings packed with pork and garlic chives, with a distinctive earthy aroma loved by dumpling enthusiasts.
description_zh: 猪肉和韭菜搭配的饺子，香气浓郁独特，是饺子爱好者的挚爱选择。

description_en: Light dumplings filled with a mix of tofu, glass noodles, and egg — a satisfying meatless option.
description_zh: 豆腐、粉丝和鸡蛋混合的素馅饺子，口感清爽，素食者的最佳选择。

description_en: Fluffy steamed buns filled with seasoned pork, scallions, and a hint of ginger — breakfast food elevated to perfection.
description_zh: 松软的发面包子，内馅为猪肉、葱花和姜末，是中式早餐中最受欢迎的选择之一。

description_en: Open-top steamed dumplings filled with pork and glutinous rice, topped with a dot of bright orange roe.
description_zh: 顶部敞开的蒸饺，内馅为猪肉和糯米，点缀橙色鱼子，是港式茶楼的招牌点心。

description_en: Flaky, multi-layered pan-fried flatbread studded with scallions — crispy outside, chewy inside.
description_zh: 层次分明的葱油饼，煎至外皮酥脆，内层柔韧，葱香浓郁，越嚼越香。

description_en: Pan-fried savory cake made from shredded radish and rice flour with dried shrimp and mushrooms.
description_zh: 白萝卜丝与粘米粉制成的糕点，加入虾米和香菇，煎至两面金黄，是港式茶餐厅的经典点心。

description_en: Glutinous rice stuffed with pork, mushrooms, and chicken, steamed inside a lotus leaf that perfumes the filling.
description_zh: 糯米包入猪肉、香菇和鸡肉，用荷叶包裹后蒸制，荷叶清香渗入糯米中，回味无穷。

description_en: Caramelized pork shoulder marinated in honey, soy, and five-spice, roasted until lacquered with a perfect sweet-smoky crust.
description_zh: 猪肩肉用蜂蜜、酱油和五香粉腌制后烤制，外皮焦糖化，甜咸相间，是粤式烧腊的招牌。

description_en: Whole fish steamed to flaky perfection then topped with ginger, scallions, and a pour of hot soy-sesame oil.
description_zh: 整条鱼蒸至刚熟，铺上姜丝和葱段，泼入热油激出香气，鲜嫩清甜，是粤菜的精髓所在。

description_en: Whole chicken slow-cooked in coarse salt until the meat is unbelievably tender and infused with subtle savory depth.
description_zh: 整鸡用粗盐焗制，肉质鲜嫩多汁，皮薄有嚼劲，是客家名菜，原汁原味。

description_en: Crispy battered pork pieces glazed in a vibrant sweet and sour sauce with pineapple and bell peppers.
description_zh: 酥炸猪肉块裹上酸甜酱汁，配菠萝和彩椒，色彩鲜艳，酸甜可口，老少皆宜。

description_en: Buttery pastry shells filled with a smooth, lightly sweetened egg custard — the signature dessert of dim sum.
description_zh: 酥脆的黄油挞皮中填入细滑的鸡蛋布丁，甜而不腻，是港式点心中最受欢迎的甜点。

description_en: Silky rice porridge slow-cooked with lean pork and century egg, a nourishing Cantonese breakfast classic.
description_zh: 大米熬成绵滑的粥底，加入瘦肉丝和皮蛋，是粤式早餐中最养胃的选择。

name_en: Steamed Spare Ribs with Black Bean
description_en: Bite-sized spare ribs steamed with fermented black beans and chili until fork-tender and deeply savory.
description_zh: 小块排骨与豆豉和辣椒一同蒸制，软烂入味，豆豉的咸香渗透每一块排骨。

description_en: Velvety slices of beef stir-fried with broccoli in a glossy, savory oyster sauce — a Cantonese restaurant staple.
description_zh: 嫩滑的牛肉片与西兰花在蚝油中爆炒，酱汁浓亮，是粤菜馆的常见家常菜。

description_en: Deep-fried then steamed chicken feet in a black bean sauce — gelatinous, savory, and a true dim sum classic.
description_zh: 先炸后蒸的鸡爪，裹上豆豉酱，皮软骨韧，是港式茶楼的招牌点心，深受食客喜爱。

description_en: A northeastern stir-fry of eggplant, potato, and green pepper in a rich garlic-soy sauce — hearty and satisfying.
description_zh: 东北名菜，茄子、土豆和青椒大火爆炒，蒜香浓郁，下饭神器。

description_en: Northeastern Chinese sweet and sour pork: battered slices of tenderloin fried crispy then tossed in a tangy glaze.
description_zh: 东北特色菜，猪里脊裹糊炸至酥脆，再淋上酸甜汁，外酥内嫩，是东北家宴必备菜。

description_en: Fish fillets poached in a tangy, mildly spicy broth made from fermented mustard greens — a Chongqing classic.
description_zh: 鱼片在酸菜汤中汆煮，汤底酸辣开胃，鱼肉嫩滑，是重庆江湖菜的代表之一。

description_en: Slow-simmered pork belly with glass noodles and napa cabbage in a warming, flavor-packed broth.
description_zh: 猪五花与粉条和白菜一同炖制，汤浓味厚，是东北人冬天最爱的家常菜。

description_en: Lightly smashed cucumbers dressed with garlic, rice vinegar, sesame oil, and chili — crunchy and refreshing.
description_zh: 拍碎的黄瓜拌上蒜末、米醋、芝麻油和辣椒，清脆爽口，是夏日开胃小菜的首选。

description_en: Giant, tender Shanghainese pork meatballs braised with napa cabbage in a clear, delicate broth.
description_zh: 大如拳头的猪肉丸子与白菜一同在清汤中慢炖，肉质松软细嫩，汤汁鲜甜清淡。

description_en: Cold poached chicken marinated in Shaoxing wine and aromatics overnight, served chilled with a fragrant jelly.
description_zh: 白煮鸡浸在绍兴花雕酒和香料中腌制一夜，冷藏后切片，酒香浓郁，肉质嫩滑。

description_en: Thick, chewy rice cake ovals stir-fried with pork, vegetables, and a savory soy-based sauce.
description_zh: 椭圆形的年糕与猪肉和蔬菜大火翻炒，酱汁裹附，外软内糯，是上海街头的人气小吃。

name_en: Steamed Fish Head with Chopped Chili
description_en: A halved fish head buried under a mound of fermented chopped chilies and steamed to perfection — bold and dramatic.
description_zh: 鱼头铺满剁椒蒸制，辣椒的发酵香气与鱼肉的鲜嫩完美融合，是湖南菜的镇桌之作。

description_en: Cauliflower florets stir-fried until slightly charred with pork belly, dried chilies, and doubanjiang.
description_zh: 花椰菜与五花肉、干辣椒和豆瓣酱一起干炒，边缘微焦，香辣干爽，越吃越停不下来。

description_en: Thin-sliced pork belly stir-fried with fresh green chilies in a fast, high-heat Hunan style — simple and explosive.
description_zh: 猪五花与新鲜绿辣椒大火爆炒，简单快速却香辣爆口，是湖南家庭饭桌上的常客。

description_en: Thick, chewy hand-pulled noodles tossed with spiced lamb, peppers, and tomatoes — a Xinjiang staple.
description_zh: 粗实的手拉面与羊肉、辣椒和番茄一同翻炒，是新疆维吾尔族最具代表性的家常面食。

description_en: Juicy cumin-spiced lamb pieces charcoal-grilled on skewers — the street food of Xinjiang that defined a generation.
description_zh: 羊肉块穿串后炭火烤制，撒上孜然和辣椒粉，外焦里嫩，是新疆最著名的街头小吃。

description_en: Saffron-tinged rice slow-cooked with lamb, carrots, onions, and raisins — a fragrant Silk Road centerpiece.
description_zh: 羊肉、胡萝卜、洋葱和葡萄干与大米一同焖制，色泽金黄，饭粒分明，是新疆节庆饭桌上的主角。

description_en: A massive, deeply spiced braise of chicken, potatoes, and wide noodles in a Xinjiang-style tomato-chili sauce.
description_zh: 整只鸡与土豆和宽面条在新疆风味的番茄辣椒汤中炖制，分量超大，香辣浓郁，是典型的豪迈西北菜。

description_en: Flaky, oven-baked dumplings stuffed with spiced minced lamb and onion — a tandoor-kissed Xinjiang specialty.
description_zh: 用馕坑烤制的酥皮包子，内馅为羊肉末和洋葱，外皮酥脆，肉馅鲜嫩，是新疆最具特色的烤制点心。

description_en: Wide, slippery rice or wheat noodle sheets served cold with sesame paste, chili oil, vinegar, and cucumbers.
description_zh: 宽而滑的米皮或面皮，拌上芝麻酱、辣椒油、醋和黄瓜，是西北地区夏季最受欢迎的凉食。

description_en: Crisp-edged, sesame-dusted Uyghur flatbread baked in a tandoor oven — essential for scooping up stews and curries.
description_zh: 撒上芝麻的维吾尔族馕饼，在馕坑中烤至外脆内软，搭配各种炖菜食用，是新疆人的主食。

description_en: Wok-tossed day-old rice with eggs, scallions, and a touch of soy — simple, smoky, and deeply satisfying.
description_zh: 隔夜米饭与鸡蛋在高温铁锅中爆炒，加入葱花和酱油，锅气十足，是最经典的中式炒饭。

description_en: The definitive Chinese fried rice with shrimp, char siu, peas, and egg, each grain distinct and aromatic.
description_zh: 虾仁、叉烧、豌豆和鸡蛋炒制，米粒颗颗分明，色泽金黄，是中国炒饭的标杆之作。

description_en: DIY soup pot — pick your own meats, vegetables, and noodles from the bar, cooked in a spicy mala broth. Sold by weight.
description_zh: 自选荤素食材按重量计费，在麻辣汤底中涮煮，鲜香麻辣，丰俭由人。

description_en: Rice cooked in a clay pot with your choice of toppings — the crust that forms on the bottom is the best part.
description_zh: 砂锅中焖制的米饭，表面铺上各式食材，锅底形成的焦脆饭焦是粤式煲仔饭的精华所在。

description_en: Crispy fried rolls stuffed with glass noodles, pork, and vegetables — golden and satisfying.
description_zh: 酥脆的炸春卷内填粉丝、猪肉和蔬菜，外皮金黄，咬开热气腾腾，是宴席上的常见凉菜点心。

description_en: Blistered green peppers charred in a dry pan then braised with garlic, soy, and black vinegar — smoky and punchy.
description_zh: 青椒在干锅中烙至虎皮纹，加蒜、酱油和醋炒制，外皮微焦，内里软糯，下饭效果极佳。

description_en: Silky eggplant braised until meltingly tender in a bold doubanjiang and garlic sauce.
description_zh: 茄子烧至绵软，裹上浓郁的豆瓣酱和蒜末，色泽红亮，香辣下饭，是川式家常菜的代表。

description_en: Ultra-silky steamed egg custard finished with soy sauce and sesame oil — as smooth as tofu, deeply comforting.
description_zh: 蛋液加水蒸制成细嫩如豆腐的蛋羹，淋上酱油和香油，入口即化，是最简单却最治愈的家常菜。

description_en: Whole shrimp sautéed in an avalanche of garlic with glass noodles that soak up every drop of the sauce.
description_zh: 整只虾铺在粉丝上，蒜蓉大量铺盖蒸制，蒜香渗入粉丝和虾肉，鲜嫩无比。

description_en: Smooth rice noodles in a rich pork and beef bone broth, topped with braised meats, pickled vegetables, and peanuts.
description_zh: 以猪骨和牛骨熬成的浓郁汤底，配上细滑的米粉、卤肉、酸菜和花生，是广西桂林的招牌早餐。

description_en: Milky, collagen-rich pork bone broth with wavy noodles — warming and deeply nourishing.
description_zh: 猪骨熬制的奶白色浓汤，汤体醇厚，配上波浪面条，鲜美滋补，暖胃又养身。

description_en: Hollow-stemmed water spinach flash-fried with garlic and fermented tofu — crisp, vibrant, and satisfying.
description_zh: 通心菜与蒜末和腐乳大火翻炒，脆嫩爽口，是粤式餐厅最受欢迎的炒青菜之一。

description_en: Clear, delicate broth with translucent winter melon and minced pork — a gentle, nourishing Cantonese classic.
description_zh: 冬瓜与猪肉末在清鸡汤中煮制，汤色清澈，口感清甜，是粤式家庭餐桌上常见的养生汤品。

description_en: Hunan-style braised pork belly with a distinctively rich, slightly sweet, deeply red glaze — Chairman Mao's legendary favorite.
description_zh: 湖南风味红烧肉，酱色深红，口感软糯，微甜的糖色与酱汁交融，据说是毛泽东最爱的一道菜。

name_en: Lotus Root and Pork Rib Soup
description_en: A long-simmered soup of pork ribs and crunchy lotus root — milky, sweet, and restorative.
description_zh: 猪排骨与藕段长时间炖煮，汤色奶白，藕脆排骨软，清甜滋补，是湖南家庭的传统养生汤。

description_en: Northeastern-style dumplings stuffed with sweet corn and pork, offering a delightful pop of sweetness with every bite.
description_zh: 东北风味饺子，内馅为玉米粒和猪肉，玉米的清甜与猪肉的鲜香完美搭配，口感丰富。

description_en: Whole pork hock braised for hours in soy, star anise, and Shaoxing wine until the collagen melts and the skin clings to the bone.
description_zh: 猪蹄用酱油、八角和绍兴酒慢炖数小时，胶质丰富，皮糯肉烂，是豪放的家常硬菜。

description_en: Green beans blistered in a dry wok then tossed with minced pork, Yibin preserved vegetable, and chili.
description_zh: 四季豆在干锅中煸至外皮起皱，再与猪肉末、芽菜和辣椒翻炒，干香脆嫩，是川菜馆的常青招牌。

description_en: A flat disc of seasoned ground pork steamed until silky smooth, topped with a soy glaze — simple home cooking at its finest.
description_zh: 猪肉末调味后压成饼状蒸制，嫩滑细腻，淋上酱油和葱花，是广东家庭最暖心的家常蒸菜。

description_en: Golden, crispy-fried tofu cubes drizzled with a fragrant soy and scallion sauce — satisfying even for non-vegetarians.
description_zh: 豆腐炸至外皮酥脆，淋上葱姜酱油汁，外脆内嫩，是素食者和肉食者都爱的万能小菜。

description_en: Sweet corn cobs and tender pork ribs simmered into a naturally sweet, milky soup — the definition of Chinese home comfort.
description_zh: 玉米与猪排骨一同炖煮，汤汁清甜，是最朴实的中式家常汤品，每一口都是家的味道。

description_en: A plant-based riff on mapo tofu with silky eggplant taking the place of tofu in a fiery mala sauce.
description_zh: 以茄子代替豆腐，裹上与麻婆豆腐同款的麻辣酱汁，软糯入味，是麻婆系列的创意演绎。

description_en: Crunchy, sliced jellyfish tossed with sesame oil, garlic, and rice vinegar — a refreshing, textural cold starter.
description_zh: 海蜇丝拌上芝麻油、蒜末和米醋，清爽脆嫩，是中式冷盘中不可多得的清新小菜。

description_en: Pork ribs marinated in Sichuan spices and wok-fried until caramelized with a numbing chili finish.
description_zh: 猪排骨用四川香料腌制后爆炒，外皮焦糖化，麻辣余韵持久，是下酒的绝佳选择。

description_en: Plump eggplant chunks braised in a sweet soy sauce until glossy and meltingly tender.
description_zh: 茄子块在酱油和糖汁中慢炖至软烂，色泽红亮，甜鲜入味，是家常便饭里最下饭的一道菜。

description_en: Reconstituted tofu skin tossed with chili oil, garlic, and Sichuan peppercorns — a chewy, intensely flavored cold dish.
description_zh: 泡发的腐竹拌上辣椒油、蒜末和花椒，软韧有嚼劲，麻辣十足，是下酒下饭的好搭档。

description_en: Crisp cucumber slices quickly stir-fried with pork strips and garlic — fast, fresh, and deeply satisfying.
description_zh: 黄瓜与猪肉丝大火爆炒，加蒜末提香，清脆鲜嫩，简单快手，是家常快炒的代表之作。

name_en: Pork Belly Braised with Firm Tofu
description_en: Firm tofu soaks up all the luxurious juices from slow-braised pork belly — the ultimate pairing.
description_zh: 老豆腐与红烧肉一同炖制，豆腐充分吸收肉汁的精华，软嫩鲜美，比肉本身更令人回味。

description_en: Thin cucumber coins tossed in garlic vinegar dressing with chili oil — the quintessential Chinese table starter.
description_zh: 黄瓜切片后拌上蒜末、香醋和辣椒油，清凉爽脆，是中餐桌上最常见的开胃小凉菜。

description_en: Poached chicken bathed in dark soy, ginger, and star anise until mahogany-lacquered and deeply savory.
description_zh: 整鸡在生抽、姜和八角中卤至酱色深红，斩件后肉质嫩滑，咸鲜回甘，是粤式卤味的代表。

description_en: Plump dumplings filled with pork and earthy shiitake mushrooms — umami-rich and deeply satisfying.
description_zh: 猪肉与香菇混合的馅料包入饺皮，香菇的鲜味使馅料层次更加丰富，是饺子馅中的上乘之选。

description_en: Chewy buckwheat noodles served in a chilled sweet-sour broth with beef, cucumber, and a boiled egg.
description_zh: 荞麦冷面配冰凉的甜酸汤底，加牛肉片、黄瓜丝和卤蛋，是延边朝鲜族的经典夏日主食。

description_en: A thin, pan-fried pancake packed with scrambled egg and garlic chives — a popular street breakfast across China.
description_zh: 鸡蛋和韭菜混合后摊成薄饼，香气扑鼻，是中国街头最受欢迎的早餐饼之一。

description_en: A warming Xinjiang-style soup of tender lamb offal in a milky, cumin-scented broth — hearty and restorative.
description_zh: 羊杂与香料在奶白的羊骨汤中慢炖，孜然香气浓郁，暖胃养身，是新疆人冬日早餐的首选。

description_en: Crunchy, dark wood ear mushrooms dressed with garlic, chili, and black vinegar — a snappy and refreshing cold dish.
description_zh: 脆嫩的黑木耳拌上蒜末、辣椒和黑醋，口感爽脆，是低热量高营养的健康凉菜。

description_en: Thin strips of lamb flash-fried with cumin, dried chilies, and onion — fragrant, smoky, and boldly spiced.
description_zh: 羊肉丝与孜然、干辣椒和洋葱大火爆炒，孜然的香气完全激发，是新疆风味中备受欢迎的一道菜。

description_en: Chicken pieces braised in equal parts sesame oil, soy sauce, and rice wine with loads of basil — a Taiwanese classic.
description_zh: 鸡肉用等量的香油、酱油和米酒烧制，加入大量九层塔，汤汁浓缩后香气四溢，是台湾最具代表性的家常菜。

description_en: A seafood variation of kung pao with plump shrimp, peanuts, and dried chilies in the classic sweet-spicy sauce.
description_zh: 以虾球代替鸡丁的宫保版本，虾肉弹牙，搭配花生和干辣椒，甜辣爽口。

description_en: The most beloved Chinese home dish: sweet tomatoes and fluffy scrambled eggs tossed together in a savory-sweet sauce.
description_zh: 酸甜的番茄与嫩滑的鸡蛋翻炒，是中国人最有家的感觉的一道菜，简单却无可替代。

description_en: Firm tofu braised in a garlicky doubanjiang sauce — a rich, spicy dish that satisfies like a hearty stew.
description_zh: 老豆腐在豆瓣酱和蒜末中炖煮，酱香浓郁，辣味适中，是素食者和肉食者都喜爱的佳肴。

description_en: Whole duck roasted until the skin is lacquered and crispy, served with thin pancakes, scallions, and hoisin sauce.
description_zh: 整只鸭子烤至皮脆肉嫩，配薄饼、葱丝和甜面酱一起食用。

description_en: Crispy deep-fried chicken pieces seasoned with five-spice, garlic, and chili — crunchy outside, juicy inside.
description_zh: 鸡块经五香粉、蒜和辣椒调味后炸至金黄酥脆，外酥里嫩。

description_en: A thin, chewy crepe wrapped around egg, often with corn, cheese, or pork floss fillings — classic Taiwanese breakfast.
description_zh: 薄脆面皮裹上鸡蛋，可加玉米、芝士或肉松，是台湾经典早餐。

description_en: Warm fresh soy milk paired with golden fried dough sticks — the quintessential Chinese breakfast combo.
description_zh: 温热的现磨豆浆搭配金黄酥脆的油条，是最经典的中式早餐搭配。

description_en: Silky rice noodles in a rich, slow-simmered chicken or pork broth with pickled vegetables and fresh herbs.
description_zh: 滑嫩米线浸在浓郁的鸡汤或猪骨汤中，配酸菜和香草，鲜美可口。

description_en: Sliced honey-glazed char siu pork over steamed rice, drizzled with sweet soy sauce — a Hong Kong lunch staple.
description_zh: 蜜汁叉烧切片铺在白饭上，淋上甜酱油，是港式经典午餐。

description_en: Strong black tea pulled through a silk stocking filter, mixed with evaporated milk — smooth, bold, and iconic.
description_zh: 浓红茶经丝袜过滤后加入淡奶，口感顺滑醇厚，是港式经典。

description_en: Bite-sized chicken pieces wok-fried with a mountain of dried red chilies, Sichuan peppercorns, and peanuts.
description_zh: 鸡丁与大量干辣椒、花椒和花生一起爆炒，麻辣焦香。

description_en: Whole fish grilled then simmered in a bubbling mala broth with tofu, vegetables, and bean sprouts.
description_zh: 整条鱼烤至焦香后浸入麻辣汤底，配豆腐、蔬菜和豆芽，麻辣鲜美。

description_en: Fried pork chop over fried rice, baked with tomato sauce and melted cheese — a Hong Kong cha chaan teng classic.
description_zh: 炸猪排铺在炒饭上，浇番茄酱和芝士焗至金黄，是茶餐厅经典。

description_en: Fluffy steamed buns filled with sweet and savory barbecued pork in a sticky glaze — a dim sum essential.
description_zh: 松软的蒸包子里包裹着甜咸适口的蜜汁叉烧馅料，是广式早茶必点之一。

description_en: Silky steamed rice noodle sheets rolled around shrimp, pork, or vegetables, drizzled with sweet soy sauce.
description_zh: 滑嫩的蒸米粉皮卷入虾仁、猪肉或蔬菜，淋上甜酱油，是广东早茶的经典主食。

description_en: A bubbling pot of fiery Sichuan broth loaded with chili and peppercorn — cook meats, vegetables, and noodles at the table.
description_zh: 翻滚的麻辣锅底配上各式涮菜和肉类，在餐桌上现煮现吃，是川菜社交聚餐的灵魂。

description_en: Plump pork wontons bathed in a fragrant chili oil sauce with garlic, vinegar, and Sichuan peppercorn.
description_zh: 饱满的猪肉馄饨浸在香辣红油中，配以蒜泥、香醋和花椒，麻辣鲜香，开胃过瘾。

description_en: Chilled sliced beef dressed in a bold, tangy special sauce with chili oil and aromatic spices.
description_zh: 冷切牛肉片拌以特制酱汁，辣椒油与香料交织，是开胃的川式凉菜。

description_en: Boiled pork dumplings served in a pool of fragrant red chili oil with garlic and Sichuan peppercorn.
description_zh: 水煮猪肉饺子浸在红油辣椒中，配以蒜末和花椒，麻辣鲜香。

description_en: Thinly sliced beef tossed in a fiery mala sauce with Sichuan peppercorns, chili flakes, and sesame.
description_zh: 薄切牛肉拌上麻辣酱汁、花椒碎和芝麻，又麻又辣，层次丰富。

description_en: Silky steamed eggplant drizzled with a spicy chili-garlic sauce — light yet boldly flavored.
description_zh: 蒸至软糟的茄子淋上辣椒蒜蓉酱，口感细嫩，辣味醇厚。

description_en: Whole duck smoked over camphor wood and tea leaves, then deep-fried for crackling skin — a Sichuan delicacy.
description_zh: 整鸭以樟木和茶叶烟熏后油炸，外皮酥脆，肉质紧实，是四川名菜。

name_en: Pig Ear in Red Chili Oil
description_en: Thinly sliced braised pig ear dressed in red chili oil with garlic and cilantro — crunchy and spicy.
description_zh: 卤猪耳切薄片，拌上红油、蒜末和香菜，脆嫩爽口，是经典川味凉菜。

description_en: A warming soup thickened with egg ribbons, tofu, and wood ear mushrooms in a peppery vinegar broth.
description_zh: 以醋和胡椒调味的浓汤，内有蛋花、豆腐和木耳，酸辣开胃。

description_en: Delicate pork wontons floating in a clear, savory chicken broth with scallions and sesame oil.
description_zh: 薄皮猪肉馄饨浮在清鸡汤中，撒上葱花和芝麻油，清淡鲜美。

description_en: A velvety Hangzhou-style soup of minced beef, egg whites, and cilantro in a delicate starch-thickened broth.
description_zh: 杭州名汤，牛肉末与蛋白在芡汁中交融，口感丝滑，撒上香菜，清鲜雅致。

description_en: Slow-simmered pig feet in a rich, milky collagen broth with ginger and peanuts — hearty and nourishing.
description_zh: 猪蹄加姜和花生慢炖至汤色浓白，胶原蛋白丰富，滋补暖身。

description_en: Noodle soup with shredded pork and tangy Sichuan preserved mustard greens in a light broth.
description_zh: 肉丝和榴菜丝在清汤面中，咸鲜适口，是四川面馆的家常款。

description_en: Chewy sweet potato noodles in a tangy, spicy broth topped with peanuts, scallions, and chili oil.
description_zh: 红薯粉条在酸辣汤底中，配花生碎、葱花和辣椒油，酸辣爽滑，是重庆街头名小吃。

description_en: Stir-fried thin rice vermicelli with curry powder, shrimp, pork, and vegetables — lightly spiced and fragrant.
description_zh: 细米粉与哖喱粉、虾仁、猪肉和蓔菜翻炒，色泽金黄，香气四溢。

description_en: Fish fillets wok-tossed in a savory doubanjiang sauce with peppers and leeks — a seafood twist on twice-cooked pork.
description_zh: 鱼片先滑油后与青椒、蒜苗在豆瓣酱中回锅翻炒，是回锅肉的鱼版创意。

description_en: Wok-seared beef strips coated in toasted cumin, chili flakes, and onion — smoky and aromatic.
description_zh: 牛肉条爆炒后裹上孜然、辣椒碎和洋葱，烟熏香浓，西北风味十足。

description_en: Shredded beef dry-fried until crispy with celery, chili, and Sichuan peppercorn — chewy and intensely savory.
description_zh: 牛肉丝干煨至酥脆，与芹菜、辣椒和花椒翻炒，干香有嚼劲。

description_en: Battered beef strips deep-fried until shatteringly crispy, then tossed with dried chilies and Sichuan peppercorn.
description_zh: 牛肉条裹浆炸至酥脆，与干辣椒和花椒爆炒，外酥内嫩，香辣过瘾。

description_en: Tender fatty beef slices in a golden sour pepper broth — tangy, warming, and deeply flavorful.
description_zh: 肥牛片在酸汤中涮煮，汤色金黄，酸辣开胃，鲜香浓郁。

description_en: Fish fillets poached in a tart, chili-laced sour broth with tomato and pickled peppers.
description_zh: 鱼片在酸辣汤底中煮制，以番茄和泡椒提味，酸爽鲜嫩。

name_en: Spicy Cellophane Noodle with Minced Pork
description_en: Glass noodles stir-fried with seasoned minced pork in a savory, lightly spicy sauce — the pork clings to the noodles like ants on branches.
description_zh: 粉丝与调味肉末翻炒，肉末附着在粉丝上如蚂蚁爬树，咸鲜微辣，下饭佳品。

description_en: Sliced pork belly wok-fried with fresh green and red peppers in a smoky, savory sauce — rustic comfort food.
description_zh: 五花肉与青红椒在高温下爆炒，锅气十足，是最家常的下饭菜。

description_en: Pork ribs glazed in a sticky sweet-and-sour sauce of vinegar, sugar, and soy — caramelized and tender.
description_zh: 排骨裹上糖醋汁烧至收汁，外层焦糖化，酸甜适口，骨肉相连。

description_en: Braised pork feet tossed in a fiery mala sauce — rich, gelatinous, and intensely spiced.
description_zh: 卤猪蹄拌上麻辣酱汁，胶质丰富，又麻又辣，是重口味爱好者的心头好。

description_en: Tender shredded beef stir-fried with spicy green peppers — a quick, fragrant Sichuan classic.
description_zh: 牛肉丝与小青椒爆炒，鲜辣脆嫩，是四川家常快手菜。

description_en: Tender beef simmered in a bubbling, fiery mala broth served in a cast-iron pot at the table.
description_zh: 牛肉在麻辣锅底中炖煮，端上铁锅热气腾腾，麻辣浓香。

description_en: Duck pieces braised in beer with ginger, star anise, and dried chilies until tender and deeply savory.
description_zh: 鸭块加啤酒、姜、八角和干辣椒焖煮，酒香与肉香交融，鲜嫩入味。

description_en: Sizzling dry-pot beef with onions, peppers, and celery in a bold chili-bean sauce — served on a hot griddle.
description_zh: 牛肉与洋葱、辣椒在干锅中翻炒，酱香浓郁，端上铁板滋滋作响。

description_en: Wok-charred lamb slices on a sizzling griddle with cumin, dried chili, and onions.
description_zh: 羊肉片与孜然、干辣椒和洋葱在干锅中爆炒，膻香与麻辣交织。

description_en: Julienned potato stir-fried with dried chilies and Sichuan peppercorn in rice vinegar — crunchy and tangy.
description_zh: 土豆切丝爆炒，加干辣椒、花椒和米醋，酸辣爽脆，是中国国民家常菜。

description_en: Pan-fried glutinous rice cakes filled with sweet pumpkin paste and coated in sesame seeds — golden and chewy.
description_zh: 南瓜泥与糟米粉制成饼，裹上芝麻煎至金黄，外酥内糟，清甜可口。

description_en: Tiny glutinous rice balls in a warm, sweet fermented rice soup with osmanthus and goji berries.
description_zh: 小汤圆浸在甜酒酿中，加桂花和枞杮，温热甜蜜，是江南经典甜品。

description_en: Chewy glutinous rice balls filled with a molten black sesame paste — a classic Chinese dessert.
description_zh: 糟米皮包裹流沙黑芝麻馅，咬开后芝麻糊缓缓流出，甜香浓郁。

name_en: Beef and Tripe in Red Chili Oil
description_en: Sliced beef and honeycomb tripe tossed in a bold red chili oil dressing with sesame and scallion.
description_zh: 牛肉片和牛肚拌上红油、芝麻和葱花，麻辣鲜香，是川式经典凉拌菜。

description_en: Tender steamed chicken drenched in a pungent garlic and chili oil sauce — silky and aromatic.
description_zh: 鸡肉蒸至嫩滑，淋上蒜泥和辣椒油，香气扑鼻，蒜香浓郁。

description_en: Shredded poached chicken in a nutty sesame-chili sauce — the name comes from the mallet used to tenderize the meat.
description_zh: 鸡肉丝拌上芝麻辣椒酱汁，因制作时用棒敲打鸡肉而得名，麻辣鲜香。

description_en: Slippery mung bean jelly noodles dressed in a fiery chili oil and Sichuan peppercorn sauce — a Chengdu street snack.
description_zh: 绿豆凉粉切条，拌上红油、花椒和蒜泥，滑嫩爽口，是成都街头的人气小吃。

description_en: Crunchy fermented vegetables pickled in a tangy Sichuan brine with chili and Sichuan peppercorn.
description_zh: 蔬菜在四川泡菜坛中发酵，酸辣爽脆，是川菜餐桌上的经典开胃小菜。

description_en: Shredded pork stir-fried in a tangy, slightly sweet fish-fragrant sauce with wood ear mushrooms and bamboo shoots.
description_zh: 肉丝与木耳、笋丝在鱼香汁中翻炒，酸甜微辣，是川菜中最经典的家常菜之一。

name_en: Chongqing Diced Chicken with Hot Chili Peppercorn
description_en: Crispy diced chicken buried in a mountain of dried chilies and Sichuan peppercorns — fiery and addictive Chongqing style.
description_zh: 鸡丁在大量干辣椒和花椒中爆炒，外酥里嫩，麻辣刺激，是重庆江湖菜的代表。

description_en: Tender fish fillets braised in a rich, savory doubanjiang chili bean paste sauce.
description_zh: 鱼片在豆瓣酱中烧制，酱香浓郁，咸鲜微辣，是川菜中的经典鱼类做法。

description_en: Shredded chicken stir-fried in a tangy fish-fragrant sauce with pickled peppers, garlic, and ginger.
description_zh: 鸡丝在鱼香酱汁中翻炒，配泡椒、蒜和姜，酸甜咸辣，层次丰富。

description_en: Braised pork intestines wok-fried with peppers, onions, and chili bean paste in a sizzling dry pot.
description_zh: 肥肠与辣椒、洋葱在豆瓣酱中干锅翻炒，肥而不腻，香辣过瘾。

description_en: A whole fish simmered in a fiery mala broth of Sichuan peppercorn and dried chili — the house signature.
description_zh: 整条鱼在麻辣汤底中炖煮，花椒和干辣椒的香气渗入鱼肉，是店内招牌菜。

description_en: Whole fish braised in a fragrant, spicy sauce with garlic, ginger, and dried chilies.
description_zh: 整条鱼在香辣酱汁中烧制，蒜、姜和干辣椒的香气浓郁，鲜辣可口。

description_en: Crispy whole fish scored in a crosshatch pattern, deep-fried and glazed with a sweet-tangy sauce topped with pine nuts.
description_zh: 整鱼改花刀炸至酥脆，淋上糖醋汁，撒上松子，外酥里嫩，酸甜适口。

description_en: Whole fish braised in a rich, savory doubanjiang chili bean paste sauce — a Sichuan classic preparation.
description_zh: 整条鱼在豆瓣酱中红烧，酱香浓厚，咸鲜入味，是四川鱼类菜品的经典做法。

description_en: Flaky, multi-layered pan-fried flatbread with scallions — crispy outside, chewy inside, torn apart by hand.
description_zh: 层层酥脆的煎饼，外焦里嫩，葱香四溢，用手撕着吃最过瘾。

description_en: Delicate pork wontons swimming in a rich, golden chicken broth with scallions and sesame oil.
description_zh: 薄皮馄饨浸在浓郁的金色鸡汤中，撒上葱花和芝麻油，鲜美暖胃。

description_en: Crispy battered shrimp tossed in a creamy sweet sauce — a crowd-pleasing snack.
description_zh: 炸虾仁裹上酸甜奶油酱，外酥内弹，甜而不腻，老少皆宜。

description_en: Deep-fried skewers of chicken, beef, lamb, sausage, or shrimp — seasoned with cumin and chili.
description_zh: 鸡肉、牛肉、羊肉、香肠或虾串炸至金黄，撒上孜然和辣椒粉，香气扑鼻。

description_en: DIY stir-fried dry pot — pick your own meats, vegetables, and noodles, wok-tossed in mala spices. Sold by weight.
description_zh: 自选荤素食材按重量计费，在麻辣酱料中大火爆炒，干香浓烈，过瘾十足。

description_en: House specialty hand-pulled noodles in a rich, slow-simmered beef broth with tender braised beef slices.
description_zh: 招牌手工拉面配浓郁牛骨汤底和卤牛肉片，汤鲜面劲，是店内人气主食。

description_en: Bite-sized steamed buns deep-fried until golden and crispy, served with sweetened condensed milk for dipping.
description_zh: 小馒头炸至金黄酥脆，蘸炼乳食用，外酥内软，甜香诱人。

description_en: Creamy house-made soft serve ice cream — the perfect cool finish after a spicy meal.
description_zh: 店内自制软冰淇淋，奶香浓郁，是麻辣大餐后的最佳解辣甜品。

description_en: Handmade dumplings filled with fresh chives and scrambled egg — a light, savory classic.
description_zh: 手工现包饺子，韭菜鸡蛋香香的经典素馅。

description_en: Hand-wrapped dumplings stuffed with seasoned lamb and onion — juicy and aromatic.
description_zh: 手工现包羊肉饺子，羊肉洋葱馅，多汁香嫩。

description_en: Diced hand-pulled noodle pieces stir-fried with lamb, peppers, and tomato — a Xinjiang comfort classic.
description_zh: 将拉条子切成小丁，配羊肉、番茄、青椒炒制，新疆风味拌面。

description_en: Smooth rice noodles in a simple savory broth — clean and comforting.
description_zh: 清汤米粉，米香滑嫩，原汁原味。

description_en: Signature hand-pulled noodles tossed with a savory lamb and vegetable sauce.
description_zh: 拉条子拌上羊肉酱和时令菜，嘉杭尔招牌拌面。

description_en: Wok-tossed rice noodles with vegetables and savory seasoning — smoky and satisfying.
description_zh: 米粉大火爆炒，配菜调味，锅气十足。

description_en: Chilled poached chicken in a tangy, spicy dressing with fresh vegetables.
description_zh: 白煸鸡肉凉拌，酸辣爽口，配时令鲜菜。

description_en: Sliced beef and crisp cucumber in a garlicky, tangy dressing — a refreshing cold appetizer.
description_zh: 牛肉片配黄瓜，蒜香酸辣调味，爽口开胃。

description_en: Lamb slices wok-seared until crispy with cumin, chili, and onion — intensely aromatic.
description_zh: 羊肉大火干煸，配孜然、辣椒、洋葱，香辣美味。

description_en: A bold Xinjiang salad of sliced onion, green pepper, tomato, and cilantro in a sharp vinegar dressing.
description_zh: 洋葱、青椒、番茄、香菜切丝凉拌，酸辣爬口，新疆开胃菜。

description_en: Thinly sliced beef tripe tossed in a numbing-spicy chili oil dressing — bold and addictive.
description_zh: 牛百叶切丝，麻辣红油拌制，爽脆麻辣。

description_en: Charcoal-grilled cumin lamb skewers — the iconic Xinjiang street food.
description_zh: 炭火烤制羊肉串，撒上孜然辣椒，新疆经典街头味。

description_en: Traditional Uyghur rice pilaf with lamb, carrots, and raisins — fragrant and hearty.
description_zh: 新疆手抓饭，羊肉、胡萝卜、葡萄干焖制，香气扑鼻。

description_en: Creamy house-made yogurt — tangy and refreshing, a traditional Xinjiang palate cleanser.
description_zh: 自制浓郁酸奶，酸甜爽口，新疆风味甘品。

description_en: Light, fluffy honey-glazed cake — a sweet finish to a Xinjiang meal.
description_zh: 松软蜂蜜蛋糕，甘而不腻，新疆风味甘品。

description_en: Chilled noodles tossed in a rich sesame paste dressing — nutty and refreshing.
description_zh: 凉拌面条裹上浓郁麻酱，香滑爽口，夏日解馋小食。

description_en: Chilled noodles dressed in a numbing-spicy chili oil sauce — bold and addictive.
description_zh: 凉面配麻辣红油调味，爽滑过瘾，麻辣开胃。

description_en: Smashed cucumber in a numbing-spicy chili oil dressing — crunchy and fiery.
description_zh: 拍磨黄瓜配麻辣红油，爽脆麻辣，开胃凉菜。

description_en: Wood ear mushrooms in a spicy chili oil dressing — crunchy and numbing.
description_zh: 木耳配麻辣红油调味，爽脆弹牙，麻辣开胃。

description_en: Crispy scallion pancake rolled around seasoned beef — savory and satisfying.
description_zh: 香脆葱油饼卷上入味牛肉，香脆可口。

description_en: Pan-fried buns with a crispy golden bottom and juicy pork filling.
description_zh: 生煎包，底部金黄酥脆，内馅多汁鲜美。

description_en: Tender yellow beef stir-fried with fresh chili and cumin — a Hunan wok classic.
description_zh: 黄牛肉配小米椒爆炒，鲜嫩香辣，湖南经典小炒。

description_en: Pork belly slices wok-tossed with fresh chili and fermented black beans — smoky and bold.
description_zh: 五花肉配小米椒爆炒，锅气十足，湖南经典下饭菜。

description_en: Chicken pieces wok-fired with fresh chili and aromatic spices — Hunan-style heat.
description_zh: 鸡肉配小米椒爆炒，香辣入味，湖南风味小炒。

description_en: Hunan smoked bacon stir-fried with crisp bamboo shoots — smoky and earthy.
description_zh: 湖南腊肉配鲜笋片爆炒，腊香十足，笋脆可口。

description_en: Smoky Hunan cured bacon stir-fried with leeks and dried chili — deeply savory.
description_zh: 湖南腊肉配蔑椒爆炒，腊香浓郁，下饭神器。

description_en: Chicken gizzards flash-fried with chili and Sichuan peppercorn — crunchy and fiery.
description_zh: 鸡胗爆炒，配辣椒花椒，爽脆弹牙，麻辣可口。

name_en: Steamed Fish Fillets with Chopped Pepper
description_en: Delicate fish fillets steamed under a blanket of fiery chopped red pepper — Hunan's signature.
description_zh: 鱼片铺上剁椒蒸制，鲜嫩香辣，湖南经典菜。

description_en: Deep-fried fermented tofu served with spicy sauce — crispy outside, soft inside, pungent and addictive.
description_zh: 油炒臭豆腐，外酥内嫩，配辣椒酱，闻着臭吃着香。

description_en: Tender bullfrog braised in a fiery chili and Sichuan peppercorn sauce — bold and succulent.
description_zh: 牛蛙配麻辣酱汁烧制，肉质鲜嫩，麻辣过瘾。

description_en: A fiery Chongqing hotpot of blood curd, tripe, and meat in bubbling chili oil — the ultimate spicy indulgence.
description_zh: 重庆经典毛血旺，鸭血、毛肚、午餐肉在麻辣红油中翻滚，香辣过瘾。

description_en: Tender beef slow-braised with tomato and radish — hearty and comforting.
description_zh: 牛肉配番茄萝卜慢炖，汤浓肉烂，家常暖心菜。

description_en: Classic boiled dumplings filled with nappa cabbage and seasoned pork.
description_zh: 白菜猪肉馅水饺，皮薄馅大，经典家常味。

description_en: Beef and mixed vegetables simmered in a spicy Sichuan broth — like a personal hotpot.
description_zh: 牛肉配时令菜在麻辣汤底中焖煮，一人份的麻辣火锅。

description_en: Wok-fried rice with mixed vegetables — light and satisfying.
description_zh: 时令蔬菜炒饭，粒粒分明，清甘可口。
